title: Mumbai University Global Group is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Mumbai University Global Group is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Mumbai University Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Gwalior operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Mumbai University Global Group:
Mumbai University Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mumbai University Global Group!
